InitalLanding.contractMessage: Commander, We have just completed our intial landing, unopposed. {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} appears to have been correct in saying there was a sensor blind spot for us to in-fill through!  I am supprised how good their intel was commander!  However we now have an enemy force in the area searching for us. We need to smash them quickly before they can bring a hammer down on us commander!

TargetOfOpportunity1.contractMessage: Commander, {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} found us a nice juicy target!  Lets smash the targeted forces for a good pay day!

DestroyBase.contractMessage: Commander, {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} has given us a major hardpoint in their defensive network.  Go destroy that hardpoint commander!

TargetOfOpportunity2.contractMessage: Commander, {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} found us a nice juicy target!  Lets smash the targeted forces for a good pay day!

AvoidOverwhelm.contractMessage: Commander, we have achieved all goals as set out by {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName}. They want us to pull out in the most destructive way possible.   We will likely be in close contact with the enemy for quite a while before we can effect our escape Commander!

LaunchTheRaids.contractMessage: Commander, {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} has lauched all their planned Raids, here and elswhere.

PaymentDelivered.popupTitle: The Task Force Commander sends their thanks
PaymentDelivered.popupMessage: Our payment was just delivered, Commander.  {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.ShortName} is overall happy with our performance. Oh, and they sent a couple bottles of the local flavor for us to enjoy, I'm sure it's "wonderful".
